Default STARTUP TCP probe failed 1 time consecutively for container "toxic-1" on port 8000. The instance was not started.
Connection failed with status CANCELLED.
terminated: Application failed to start: failed to load /docker-entrypoint.sh: no such file or directory
Starting new instance. Reason: DEPLOYMENT_ROLLOUT - Instance started due to traffic shifting between revisions due to deployment, traffic split adjustment, or deployment health check.
